canonical_definition: MathDial, a dataset of tutoring conversations collected by human teachers interacting with simulated students, used for tutoring evaluation and preference data.
papers: Feature Extraction and Steering for Enhanced Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Language Models
Is the Top Still Spinning? Evaluating Subjectivity in Narrative Understanding
